breakdown: This PR fixes a bug where the streaming passthrough wasn't normalizing rewards boxes with non-standard keys (xp/gold_pieces vs xp_gained/gold). The fix adds fallback logic in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui to handle both key variants, plus applies normalization in the passthrough path. Good test coverage with a real E2E test that coerces the LLM to produce messy keys. Minor gaps: no docstring on the public normalize function and minimal error logging.
key_changes: Add fallback logic in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui to check for 'xp' key when 'xp_gained' is missing
Add fallback logic to check for 'gold_pieces' when 'gold' is missing
Pop non-standard keys (xp, gold_pieces) after extracting values to ensure clean output
Apply normalize_rewards_box_for_ui() to rewards_box in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair passthrough
Add test_streaming_passthrough_normalization.py E2E test that coerces LLM to generate messy rewards_box
